zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Ryder於1527年3月26日出生在英國史洛普爾史福斯波利時，他的父親William Charles Ryder17歲，母親Lady Margaret Baber Hill Ryder17歲。他和Catherine Poole至少有2個兒子。他去世於1579年10月6日在英國史洛普爾霍德特享年52歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭史洛普爾霍德特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Ryder于1527年3月26日出生在英国史洛普爾史福斯波利时，他的父亲William Charles Ryder17岁，母亲Lady Margaret Baber Hill Ryder17岁。他和Catherine Poole至少有2个儿子。他去世于1579年10月6日在英国史洛普爾霍德特享年52岁，埋葬在英国英格兰史洛普爾霍德特。

nameMeanings.name: Ryder
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Rider  .
Americanized and Flemish form of Dutch Rijder: occupational name for a mounted warrior or messenger, Middle Dutch rider ‘horseman, rider’.

variants.name: Rider
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English ridere ‘horseman’, perhaps with a specific application such as ‘forest ranger’, ‘horseman who guards crops’, or ‘mounted warrior, knight’. Compare Knight .
English: habitational name from Ryther, near Selby (Yorkshire), probably from Old English ryther ‘clearing’.

English: topographic name from Middle English ridere ‘dweller at a clearing’ (see Reeder ) or ‘dweller by a small stream’, depending on which sense of Middle English ride the surname is derived from. These topographic senses of Rider are limited to the southern counties of England (especially Surrey, Sussex, and Hampshire), where topographic names in -er and the Middle English words ride ‘clearing’ and rithe ‘small stream’ are mainly found. See also Reed .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Ryder was born on 26 March 1527, in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, his father, William Charles Ryder, was 17 and his mother, Lady Margaret Baber Hill Ryder, was 17. He had at least 2 sons with Catherine Poole. He died on 6 October 1579, in Hodnet, Shropshire, England, at the age of 52, and was buried in Hodnet, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Ryder est né le 26 mars 1527, à Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, William Charles Ryder, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Baber Hill Ryder, avait 17 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Catherine Poole. Il est décédé le 6 octobre 1579, à Hodnet, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Hodnet, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Ryder am 26. März 1527 in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Charles Ryder 17 und seine Mutter Lady Margaret Baber Hill Ryder 17. Er hatte mit Catherine Poole mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 6. Oktober 1579 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Hodnet, Shropshire, England und wurde in Hodnet, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Ryder è nato il il 26 marzo 1527 nel Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, il suo padre, William Charles Ryder, aveva 17 anni e il suo madre, Lady Margaret Baber Hill Ryder, aveva 17 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli con Catherine Poole. Morì il 6 ottobre 1579, nel Hodnet, Shropshire, England, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Hodnet, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Ryderが1527年3月26日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアシュリュースブリーで生まれた時，父William Charles Ryderは17歳，母Lady Margaret Baber Hill Ryderは17歳であった。彼はCatherine Pooleとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は1579年10月6日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアホードネットで52歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアホードネットにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Ryder(이)가 1527년 3월 26일 영국 슈럽실르 슈레w스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Charles Ryder(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret Baber Hill Ryder(은)는 17세였다. 그는 Catherine Poole(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1579년 10월 6일 영국 슈럽실르 호드넷에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 호드넷에 묻혔다.

pt.26 March 1527–6 October 1579: 26 de março de 1527–6 de outubro de 1579
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Ryder nasceu em 26 de março de 1527, em Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Charles Ryder, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Baber Hill Ryder, tinha 17 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Catherine Poole. Ele faleceu em 6 de outubro de 1579, em Hodnet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Hodnet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Ryder родился 26 марта 1527 г. в местности шрюсбури, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Charles Ryder было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Baber Hill Ryder, 17. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Catherine Poole. Он умер 6 октября 1579 г. в местности ходнет, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности ходнет, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Ryder nació el 26 de marzo de 1527, en Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Charles Ryder, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret Baber Hill Ryder, tenía 17 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Catherine Poole. Murió el 6 de octubre de 1579, en Hodnet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Hodnet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
